# Espresso Brewing

Espresso is a concentrated coffee beverage brewed by forcing hot water under high pressure through finely ground coffee beans.

## Grind and dose

A fine, consistent grind is essential for espresso. The barista doses roughly eighteen grams of ground coffee into the portafilter basket and tamps it level to create an even puck of resistance.

## Extraction and pressure

The espresso machine pushes water at about nine bars of pressure through the puck at around ninety-three degrees Celsius. A balanced shot extracts in roughly twenty-five to thirty seconds, producing a layer of crema on top.
